regulatory.name: FSAI News
regulatory.notes: No RSS. Use date-filtered pagination. fromDate/toDate format: YYYY-MM-DD. Filter results for functional foods, health claims, plant stanols/sterols.

regulatory.name: EFSA Publications
regulatory.notes: RSS is generic (all publications). Filter locally for keywords: plant sterol, plant stanol, phytosterol, phytostanol, cholesterol, functional food, health claim.

regulatory.name: EFSA All Updates
regulatory.notes: Combined feed (news + publications + events). Filter for same keywords as EFSA Publications. Use as a catch-all alongside the publications feed.

scientific.notes: Use esearch to get PMIDs, then esummary for metadata. reldate=365 because these are niche topics with ~4-11 papers/year. Paginate with retstart if count > retmax. Rate limit: max 3 requests/second without API key.

industry.name: NutraIngredients
industry.notes: RSS has ~20 items, hourly updates. Filter for stanols/sterols/cholesterol keywords. Category page for Cardiovascular health is SSR and scrapable as supplement. On-site search is JS-only (Queryly), not usable.

industry.name: Food Navigator Europe
industry.notes: Same RSS structure as NutraIngredients (~20 items). Category pages for Functional foods and Diet-health are SSR. On-site search is JS-only.

competitors.name: Benecol Ireland
competitors.notes: WordPress site, SSR. RSS feed has ~10 blog/healthy-tips items. Update frequency is sporadic. Also scrape product page for new launches.

competitors.name: Benecol UK
competitors.notes: WordPress site, SSR. More active than IE site. RSS has ~10 items. Good for tracking content strategy and new products that may come to Ireland.

competitors.name: Flora UK
competitors.notes: JS-heavy Sitecore site. No RSS, no blog. Use sitemap lastmod diffing to detect new products/recipes. ~150 URLs. No ProActiv products on this domain.

competitors.name: Flora ProActiv Ireland
competitors.notes: JS-heavy Sitecore site. No RSS. Mostly stale content (2021). Use sitemap lastmod diffing. ~100 URLs. Only 2 spread products. Watch for new product launches or content refreshes.

media.name: Irish Examiner Health
media.notes: Dedicated health Atom feed with ~35 articles including summaries and dates. Best Irish media source. Filter by date and keywords: cholesterol, heart health, supplements, functional foods, plant sterols.

media.name: Irish Times Health
media.rss_note: Global RSS only (no health filter). Prefer pagination.
media.notes: SSR pagination at /health/1/, /health/2/ etc. Many articles are paywalled. Global RSS exists but includes all sections. For health-specific: paginate and extract article links/titles from HTML. Search is JS-only.
